patterns.module_structure: All CLI modules are flat files or subdirectories in src/ (e.g., providers/). Commands wired via Command enum in main.rs.
patterns.unix_socket: Use std::os::unix::net::UnixListener for listen mode. std::os::unix::net::UnixStream for emit (fire-and-forget). tokio net feature already added to Cargo.toml.
patterns.event_log: Append to ~/.bop/bridge-events.jsonl using O_APPEND (same pattern as providers/history.rs). One JSON line per event.
patterns.hook_target: ~/.claude/settings.json is JSON. Read → merge hooks key → write back. Do not clobber non-hook fields. Existing hook arrays get bop entry appended.
patterns.error_handling: emit() must never fail sessions — return Ok(()) if socket absent. hook installer returns anyhow::Result but callers handle gracefully.
patterns.nushell_scripts: vibekanban/bop-bridge.nu uses shebang #!/usr/bin/env nu. See existing vibekanban/bop-provider.nu for style reference.
patterns.binary_path: Hook installer writes full path to bop binary. Use std::env::current_exe() to find the running binary, or accept a Path parameter in install_claude_hooks().

key_decisions: BridgeEvent uses kebab-case serde tags (e.g., 'session-start', 'stage-change') to match CLI --event flag values directly
CardStage uses kebab-case serialization to match BopDeck card state naming ('in-progress', 'human-review')
Unix socket is SOCK_STREAM not SOCK_DGRAM — each event is a newline-terminated JSON line on a short-lived connection
emit() is synchronous (std::os::unix::net) not async — hooks are shell commands, not async Rust code
listen daemon writes to bridge-events.jsonl for auditability; BopDeck reads socket directly, not the log
hook install uses merge strategy: read settings.json (or {}), merge hooks key, write back — never clobber
opencode SSE listener is async (tokio) — spawned as a long-running task
bridge emit --event flag takes kebab-case string matching BridgeEvent serde tags

socket_protocol.format: newline-delimited JSON, one BridgeEvent per line

cli_integration_matrix.claude_code: hooks in ~/.claude/settings.json — SessionStart, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop
cli_integration_matrix.opencode: SSE GET localhost:4096/event — session.status busy→InProgress idle→HumanReview, permission.updated→AwaitingHuman
cli_integration_matrix.goose: SSE /reply — out of scope for this spec (spec 035)
cli_integration_matrix.gemini: ACP ndjson — out of scope for this spec (spec 035)
cli_integration_matrix.aider: log tail — out of scope for this spec (spec 035)
cli_integration_matrix.ollama: REST poll — out of scope for this spec (spec 035)
